song.title: Breathe
song.author: Marie Barnett
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G Gsus This is the air I breathe. .G Gsus This is the air I breathe. .G D Em D C Em D Your holy presence living in me.
[V2] .G Gsus This is my daily bread. .G Gsus This is my daily bread. .G D Em D C Em D Your very word spoken to me.
[C] . G D Em D C Em D And I, I’m desperate for You. . G D Em D C Em D And I, I’m lost without You.
